lacrima_ready.title: Confirm readiness for Ch12 — have Lacrima, Emulator cleared, full Ignitium or better gear

scarlet_read.title: Review the Scarlet King lore scroll (Ch05) before Ch12 — the Manifestor Trap for the Cursed Eye is ahead

subtitle.text: The Kingdom you build will be built on everything you gathered here. Bring all of it. Leave none of it behind.

description: CH.11 · BEFORE CH12
▸ Ch12 (The Kingdom You Build) is the construction chapter.
It follows from everything assembled in Ch11.
The Lacrima triggers the Infernal Age.
The Cursed Eye is the final portal eye.
The Manifestor Trap is the mechanic.
None of these are optional. All of them have prerequisites.
This quest is the checklist.
◈ CH12 PREREQUISITES — VERIFY ALL
└ ✦ Lacrima (cataclysm:lacrima) — in inventory
DO NOT use until ready for Ch12 age transition
└ ✦ Emulator cleared — full Cataclysm chain done
└ ✦ Ignitium or Emulator gear — full set equipped
└ ✦ Cataclysm Forge scroll researched — gear recipes known
└ ✦ Cursium supply — have 16+ for Ch12 construction
└ ✦ Nether Star × 3 — Wither Eye + Ch12 crafting
└ ✦ Last Watch scroll researched — cursed age gate open
◈ CURSED EYE WARNING
└ The Cursed Eye (final portal eye, Ch12) uses the
Manifestor Trap — a KubeJS mechanic tied to
the Scarlet King fight sequence
└ Read the Scarlet King scroll (Ch05) before Ch12
└ The Wither Storm must be involved in the Manifestor Trap
└ The Crown item is the center ingredient
of the Cursed Eye recipe
└ Full mechanic: lore_scrolls.js — check vault
◈ VILE HERB STOCKPILE
└ Cursed Eye recipe also needs Vile Herb
(covered in Ch08 sculk cure path quest)
└ Farm 8+ Vile Herbs before Ch12
└ Vile Herb sources: cave flora, witch drops, brewing
◈ BUILD INFRASTRUCTURE FIRST
└ Ch12 is called 'The Kingdom You Build' for a reason
└ Set up: Create automation base, nuclear power,
portal network, and storage before age transition
└ The Infernal Age changes available recipes
— transition when your build is stable
▸ The skin has been tearing since Ch01.
The scars are the chapter titles.
Ch12 is where you use them.
Everything you broke made you harder.
Everything you built made you ready.
Walk in.
▶ Confirm Ch12 readiness — Lacrima in hand [check]
▶ Review Scarlet King scroll before crossing [check]
◇ Ch12 cannot be undone once Lacrima is obtained.
The Infernal Age transition is permanent.
Back up your world before triggering if uncertain.
Then go.
